author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE (single-dispatch full-scope Pattern B; second clean APPROVE of Pass 5 series).

All 11 audit-cited sites migrated:
- 7 foreach optimizers (rprop/adagrad/adadelta/radam/nadam/adamax/asgd) — auto-route on CUDA params via any_cuda predicate at step() entry.
- Muon — Newton-Schulz iteration now device-resident: tensor_matmul + sub + mul with scalar tensors on input.device().
- KFAC (natural_gradient.rs) — a_factor/g_factor migrated from Vec<f64> to Tensor<f64>; invert_damped_tensor uses ferrotorch_core::linalg::solve (cuSOLVER on CUDA).
- LBFGS — gather_params/gather_grads + two-loop recursion migrated to Tensor-based flat history.
- sparse_adam + adafactor verified STALE-NO-OP (already fail-fast on CUDA).

ferrotorch-optim/Cargo.toml: cuda feature added with ferrotorch-gpu optional dep (mirrors Pass 5.B.4-via-#1138 pattern).

Verification: 330/330 lib + 3/3 integration tests pass with cuda feature; build + clippy -D warnings clean. 4 sabotage probes captured verbatim panics on discriminating tests (Muon matmul drop, KFAC solve bypass, LBFGS curvature zero, foreach auto-route disabled); all reverts verified by no 'SABOTAGE' grep hits + green re-run.

Dispatch required 3 invocations due to truncation (Stage 6 GPU tests in first; sabotage probe 1 revert in second; muon sabotage residue caught by architect via failing test, cleaned up in third). End state is clean.

Zero follow-ups filed per user directive.
